Vallée du Rhône.name: Northern Rhône Syrah & Viognier
Vallée du Rhône.summary: Granite-hill Syrah from Hermitage plus Côte-Rôtie and Condrieu Viognier, walking the famous slopes between tastings. Big-name houses with proper tasting rooms, two estates by appointment.

stops.name: Cave de Tain
stops.visit: Free walk-in boutique tasting facing the Hermitage hill

stops.name: Maison M. Chapoutier
stops.visit: Tasting room and bookable vineyard tours with sommelier

stops.name: Vineum Paul Jaboulet Aîné
stops.visit: Wine bar and cellar tasting, La Chapelle verticals

stops.name: E. Guigal – Caveau du Château
stops.visit: Cellar tour and tasting at Château d'Ampuis

Vallée du Rhône.name: Châteauneuf-du-Pape & Gigondas Grenache
Vallée du Rhône.summary: Galets-pebble Grenache blends in the papal village, then the Dentelles de Montmirail for Gigondas. Mix of walk-in village caveaux and prestige estates by appointment.

stops.name: Château Mont-Redon
stops.visit: Caveau tasting, optional cellar visit with plateau views

stops.name: La Cave Famille Perrin (Beaucastel)
stops.visit: Village shop tasting of 5 wines daily

stops.name: Domaine du Vieux Télégraphe
stops.visit: La Crau estate tasting on the high plateau

stops.name: Caveau du Gigondas
stops.visit: Appellation tasting room, 100+ Gigondas at cellar prices

Provence.name: Bandol Mourvèdre & Cassis Whites
Provence.summary: Age-worthy Mourvèdre reds and serious rosé on Bandol's sea-facing terraces, then crisp coastal whites in the cliffside amphitheatre of Cassis. Two Bandol icons plus a Calanques estate.

stops.name: Domaine Tempier
stops.visit: Tour and tasting of legendary Bandol reds with charcuterie

stops.name: Château de Pibarnon
stops.visit: Hilltop tasting room with panoramic vineyard views
stops.note: Reservation required, free for up to 8

stops.name: Clos Sainte Magdeleine
stops.visit: Seaside-terroir Cassis white tasting and sales

Provence.name: Côtes de Provence Rosé Trail
Provence.summary: The world's most famous Provence rosés, from Gassin near Saint-Tropez to the inland Var estates. Polished tasting rooms welcoming walk-ins and booked visits.

stops.name: Château Minuty
stops.visit: Modern tasting room, full white/rosé/red range

stops.name: Château d'Esclans
stops.visit: Discovery or Prestige visit, home of Whispering Angel and Garrus

stops.name: Domaines Ott – Château de Selle
stops.visit: Tasting in contemporary cellar of the iconic skittle bottle
